name: Desogestrel And Ethinylestradiol Tablets USP
about: Desogestrel And Ethinylestradiol Tablets USP are a combination of two hormones used as a contraceptive to prevent pregnancy. The tablets contain desogestrel and ethinylestradiol, which work together to prevent ovulation. These tablets come in a pack of 21 tablets and should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. This medication is a general medicine and is manufactured in India. The tablets are in a physical form and should be stored in a dry and cool place.

faq.q: What is the use of Desogestrel And Ethinylestradiol Tablets USP?
faq.a: These tablets are used as a contraceptive to prevent pregnancy.

faq.q: How should I take Desogestrel And Ethinylestradiol Tablets USP?
faq.a: You should take these tablets as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.q: What is the packaging quantity of Desogestrel And Ethinylestradiol Tablets USP?
faq.a: These tablets come in a pack of 21 tablets.
These tablets are manufactured in India.

faq.q: How should I store Desogestrel And Ethinylestradiol Tablets USP?
faq.a: You should store these tablets in a dry and cool place.
